Compliance.description: PPRA-registered; FFC required for agents; major brand since 1976; no major regulatory issues found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.64/5 (77 reviews, 59% 1-star); Google mixed; some excellent agent experiences.

Product Value.description: Full services: sales, letting, commercial, international; Pam Golding Financial Services (bonds). Premium brand.

Innovation.description: Digital listings, social media, virtual tours; no dedicated app found; standard for premium estate agent.

Customer Support.description: Per-branch support; national head office. Reviews: inconsistent communication, agent-dependent quality.

Accessibility & Security.description: Website with listings; assumed POPIA/PPRA compliance; no app. Standard for estate agency.

socialSentiment.summary: Brand awareness strong; HelloPeter complaints dominate; some excellent agent reviews.
